name: Meatball Appetizers
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine meat, eggs, milk, crumbs, onion, parsley, salt, and pepper in a bowl and mix well.
2. Shape into tiny meatballs and brown well in oil in a large skillet.
3. Remove the meatballs from the pan.
4. Add chili sauce, jelly, and instant coffee to the pan drippings.
5. Simmer occasionally until the jelly melts, about 4 minutes.
6. Add the meatballs and simmer for an additional 10 minutes longer.
7. Serve with wooden picks. This recipe makes about 8 dozen tiny meatballs and 2 cups of sauce.
